title: Canonical tool error envelope (Form A)
description: Used by mnemos's execute_tool() dispatcher and any service that exposes tool errors as structured content rather than HTTP error codes.

success.description: Always false for error envelopes; true responses don't use this shape.

error.description: Human-readable error message safe to show to end users. Must NOT contain stack traces or sensitive data.

error_class.description: Optional: Python exception class name or domain-specific classifier. Used by clients for retry/error-recovery logic.
